selfcheck.chosen_text: Fallar si la cardinalidad no es 1:1
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: «validate, duplicación accidental y anti-join» — validate='one_to_one'|... hace fallar merges con cardinalidad rota. Not imputation, sort, or MultiIndex creation.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Filas del left sin match en right
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: same card — indicator left_only/right_only/both; anti-join = filas left_only (huérfanos). So left rows without a right match.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Reinyecta el agregado al shape original
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: «groupby / agg / transform» — transform reinyecta el agregado al shape original (e.g. score/mean_region). agg collapses; transform does not.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Incluyes datos posteriores al cutoff en features/métricas del pasado
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: «leakage temporal y controles» — Leakage = usar información posterior al cutoff for past features/metrics. Not CSV vs Excel or melt.

retrospection.note: Knowledge limited to sequential packets through active section.
